name: mycelium_fire_workflow
description: Fire a workflow: a DAG of agent invocations (fan-out, pipeline, or custom) that a dormant runner claims and executes under RAM admit-control. Pass FULLY-EXPANDED invocations: [{id, agent, model, brief, deps:[id,...]}]. Workers have deps:[]; a verifier/synthesizer lists every worker id in deps to receive their results.

name.description: Human-readable workflow name (shows in the app/cockpit)

invocations.description: The DAG: [{id:'w0', agent:'scout', model:'', brief:'...', deps:[]}, ..., {id:'verify', agent:'echo', deps:['w0','w1']}]

shape.description: Display label: fanout | pipeline | repair | custom (default custom)

project_id.description: Project to attribute the workflow to

name: mycelium_list_workflows
description: List workflows. Filter by status (pending|claimed|running|cancelling|completed|failed|cancelled) and project.

name: mycelium_workflow_status
description: Get one workflow with all its invocations (statuses + results) and recent lifecycle events.

name: mycelium_cancel_workflow
description: Cancel a workflow. Pending/claimed are cancelled immediately; a running workflow goes to 'cancelling' and the runner stops cooperatively after the current wave.
